stemHtml: An oil torque meter makes use of the following phenomenon…

options.a: axial movement is generated when cylindrically cut gears are used to transfer power from one shaft to another.
options.b: axial movement is generated when helically cut gears are used to transfer power from one shaft to another.
options.c: as power is increased, the torque shaft expands (the torque shaft is connected to the engine only).
options.d: as power is increased, the torque shaft twists (the torque shaft is connected to both the engine and the propeller`s reduction gear box).
